1.title: KNN Classification Challenge
1.focus: Build the strongest KNN classifier and maximize challenge-set accuracy.
teaching_notes: This week shows how competitive simple models can be when tuned carefully.
The leaderboard is tightly clustered, highlighting the importance of small improvements.
Mo Khan’s historical score of 0.839492 still leads this challenge.
One submission failed due to a shape mismatch, which is a useful reminder that output format matters.

2.title: KNN vs Logistic Regression Challenge
2.focus: Build the strongest classifier on the expanded dataset using either an improved KNN pipeline or logistic regression.

3.title: Regression Model Challenge
3.focus: Build the strongest regression model and minimize mean squared error on the challenge set.

4.title: Recommendation Systems Challenge
4.focus: Build the strongest collaborative filtering recommender and minimize prediction error on unseen user-item interactions.

5.title: Multiclass MLP Challenge
5.focus: Build the strongest multiclass neural network classifier and maximize accuracy on the challenge set.

6.title: Computer Vision Model Competition
6.focus: Build the strongest image classification model you can and maximize validation accuracy.

7.title: Sequential Forecasting Model Competition
7.focus: Build the strongest sequential forecasting model you can and minimize forecasting error on unseen future data.

8.title: NLP Sequence Models and Transformers Competition
8.focus: Build the strongest sentiment classification model you can using course-aligned sequence models or transformer architectures and maximize validation accuracy.
